overall.description: Static first-person view of a digital billboard in Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, displaying a Night City Police Department advertisement with the slogan 'MEET YOUR NEIGHBORS' and imagery of a futuristic police aircraft with officers rappelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with large digital advertisement display

agents.ego_description: stationary, facing and observing the digital billboard advertisement

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'MEET YOUR NEIGHBORS' with futuristic police aircraft imagery
futuristic VTOL aircraft with officers rappelling down from it
Night City Police Department and Community Program branding on the right side of the billboard
tall modern building structure visible to the left of the billboard
tall modern building structure visible to the right of the billboard

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary, focused on a large digital billboard in an urban plaza setting. The billboard displays a Night City Police Department advertisement featuring a futuristic aircraft and the slogan 'MEET YOUR NEIGHBORS'. Modern buildings frame the billboard on both sides, and the scene is devoid of pedestrians or vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, focused gaze on a towering digital advertisement within a desolate urban plaza. It begins with a stationary view of a large billboard displaying a Night City Police Department ad, featuring a futuristic aircraft and the slogan MEET YOUR NEIGHBORS. The camera remains fixed as the bright screen contrasts against the surrounding modern buildings that frame the display on both sides. The scene concludes in this state of stillness, emphasizing the emptiness of the plaza as it remains devoid of any pedestrians or vehicles.
